Help.manifesto1: Contributist is a git/GitHub/GitLab/Gitea/Bitbucket/SourceHut contribution graph editor for developers.
Help.manifesto2: Reclaim your contribution Graph! Make contributions great again! Exercise your individual freedom!
Help.manifesto3: Contributist allows corporate developers and others to keep track of contributions not always made into public repositories.
Help.manifesto4: I believe contribution graphs need to evolve, after two decades of not doing it, into something more useful for all society, not only devs.
Help.step1Text: 1. Import your GitHub/GitLab graph, by entering your username or profile url and clicking ENTER. That will bring your current graph.
Help.step2Synth: use the tool Draw, TEXT, and MEME icons
Help.step3Text: 3. Export to PNG or share the URL to your art! Or... Download a Bash or PowerShell script that commits to a dummy local repository and pushes to your remote/GitHub/GitLab/Gitea/Bitbucket/SourceHut.
Help.reactDesc: Component architecture and dynamic state synchronization.
Help.nextDesc: React framework for hydration, layout, and API routing.
Help.githubDesc: Fully open-source repository hosted on GitHub. Contribute or fork!
Help.vercelDesc: Hosted on Vercel's edge network, integrating serverless routes and CI/CD pipelines with full Analytics.
Help.proceduralNoiseDesc: Generates stochastic contribution patterns factoring in weekends, noise levels, and vacation blocks for realistic textures.
Help.layerCompositingDesc: Composites vector-drawn canvas overlays and procedural background layers dynamically through store state reducers.
Help.stateSerializationDesc: Compresses calendar draw matrices into compact base64 URL query hashes for database-free sharing.
Help.gitTranspilationDesc: Translates calendar cells to historic Unix epoch timestamps, compiling optimized Bash and PowerShell scripts.
Help.coordinateProjectionDesc: Delegates events at container level, projecting client mouse coordinate vectors over bounding box geometry to map cell indexes.

Export.dummyWarning: Create a BRAND NEW dummy contributions repository with a NEW name, in your Gitea/Gogs, GitHub, GitLab or other remote. Do not add a README, license, or gitignore file.
Export.existWarning: If the repository already exists, DELETE IT, and create it different one with a DIFFERENT name each time.
Export.existTooltip: If you reuse the same repository, or same name, orphan commits may distort your graph.
Export.identityTooltip: This is the URL of your Remote Repo, and the info needed to sign your commits. No password required.
Export.repoLabel: Repository URL - HTTPS or SSH - e.g: git@remote.com:username/reponame.git
Export.option1Tooltip:
How to run:

Mac/Linux:
bash generate-activity.sh

Windows:
Right-click .ps1 → Run with PowerShell
Export.option2Tooltip: We will create a dummy repo locally on the server and push it directly to your remote URL. Your repo MUST be completely empty.
Export.repoUrlRequired: Repository URL is required to set up the push origin.
Export.repoUrlInvalid: Repository URL must start with https://, git@, or ssh://.
Export.usernameRequired: Git Username is required to sign the commits.
Export.emailInvalid: Git Email must be a valid email format (e.g. user@example.com).
Export.overrideWarning: Write OVERRIDE to override the remote git commit history (Optional and probably useless).
Export.pushFailTip: Did you delete and recreate from scratch an empty dummy contribution repo in your remote?

Share.notice: Optional: Pick format and palette on the left. Download a PNG picture to share on social media. Or share a URL to your art.
Share.privacyDesc: Only grid cells (art), layers, years, colors, and timeline speed are shared. Your private Git remote URL, name, and email are strictly filtered out and never shared.
Share.copiedAlert: Share link with your design copied to clipboard!

Calendar.gitLabLegend: Issues, merge requests, pushes, and comments.

Sidebar.gitProfileTooltip: Enter your git, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea profile URL to get your contributions. This info is usually CACHED for 1 hour by servers and it doesn't update immediately.
Sidebar.noScenes: No community scenes found in public/templates/scenes/
Sidebar.commitFreqTip: Base probability per year. Accepts CSV values (e.g., 30,50,45) which cycle through the years. Put a zero for a blank background.
Sidebar.vacationsTip:
Amount of vacations per year, meaning patches of inactivity, to pick randomly (comma-separated).
E.g.: 1,2,2 means there's double the chance to have 2 vacations on each year.
Sidebar.daysVacationTip:
Length of each vacation in days to pick randomly (comma-separated).
E.g.: 14,28,14 means higher chance of 14 days.
Sidebar.tooltipLeftClickRemix: Left click to remix, Right click to save current into this

Alerts.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset everything? Your current drawing and layers will be lost.

Modal.savePrompt: Would you like to save changes?

Metadata.title: Contributist | GitHub Contribution Graph Generator & Painter
Metadata.description: Contributist is an interactive visual tool to paint custom pixel art on your GitHub contribution graph. Generate and customize your git commit history grid easily.
Metadata.keywords: github contribution generator, github contribution graph, github contribution painter, contributist, git green grass generator, github profile customizer, commit painter
